patch.value: GH-642: linked-test runner enters interactive init wizard before repository commands
Prevent pm test --run sandbox/context preparation from invoking interactive pm init in initialized repositories; fail non-interactively with structured remediation when preparation cannot complete.

Linked non-PM repository commands start without an init prompt under schema, tracker, and auto PM context modes; non-TTY setup failures exit deterministically with structured remediation; regression coverage proves progress starts and the child command runs.

value.author: codex-root-20260722
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence 2026-07-22: searched every pm status for interactive init wizard, linked-test sandbox initialization, tracker context, and adjacent GH-208/GH-463 lineages. No exact item exists; reused closed linked-test sandbox parent pm-52eh and related parity/remediation lineage pm-8izv and pm-6e1d. This item tracks GitHub issue #642 and remains open/unclaimed because it is documented, not part of the active context-index implementation bundle.
